episodes.title: 🌈 The Gay Rulebook We Never Received
episodes.label: S2 Ep26 · July 17, 2026
episodes.summary: This week we're diving into The Gay Rulebook We Never Received — the completely unofficial handbook that apparently every gay person got except us. After…
episodes.description:
This week we're diving into The Gay Rulebook We Never Received — the completely unofficial handbook that apparently every gay person got except us.

After a listener asked if they've broken a gay rule by never watching RuPaul's Drag Race, we started wondering: is there actually a list of rules we're all supposed to know? From gym culture and drag shows to Palm Springs, circuit parties, fashion, hookups, and stereotypes, we're unpacking the gay expectations we never signed up for.

We also talk about selling the Out at the Fair trailer, saying goodbye to a huge chapter of our lives, whether Caleb should grow a skullet, and why body hair deserves a little more respect.

Plus, we answer multiple Throuple Hotline questions from listeners navigating relationships, age gaps, friendship dynamics, and life as a throuple.

📞 Is it a gay crime to never watch RuPaul's Drag Race?
📞 How do you handle judgment as a throuple with a large age gap?
📞 What happens when a potential third starts pulling away?

🌈 The Gay Rulebook We Never Received
🏳️‍🌈 Gay culture stereotypes
💪 Gym culture & body image
👠 Drag culture & representation
🎧 Circuit parties & Palm Springs
📱 Hookup culture & dating apps
🦴 The Bowl of Chaos
☎️ Throuple Hotline
🔮 Sassy Astrology
😂 Dad Joke of the Week

episodes.title: 🌲 Tahoe, Reno & We Froze Tequila
episodes.label: S2 Ep25 · July 10, 2026
episodes.summary: We finally escaped for a much-needed vacation to Lake Tahoe and Reno… and honestly, it was exactly what we needed. This week we’re breaking down our…
episodes.description:
We finally escaped for a much-needed vacation to Lake Tahoe and Reno… and honestly, it was exactly what we needed.
This week we’re breaking down our entire Tahoe trip, from beautiful hikes and lake days to family time, casino adventures, Lime scooter rides, giant pine trees, and the reason we ended up extending the vacation instead of coming home.
We talk about what surprised us most about Tahoe, why Reno felt different this time, our favorite meals, favorite memories, and why this may have been one of the most relaxing trips we’ve taken in years.
We also answer a new Throuple Hotline question from a listener in Montreal:
📞 Have any of you ever second-guessed becoming a throuple?
📞 And does Daniel really wear socks during sex?

episodes.title: Summer Vacation Chaos ☀️ Fireworks, Road Trips & Beach Days
episodes.label: S2 Ep24 · July 3, 2026
episodes.summary: ☀️ Episode 24 is here and we’re kicking off summer vacation season!This week we’re talking all things summer including vacations, road trips, beach days,…
episodes.description: ☀️ Episode 24 is here and we’re kicking off summer vacation season!This week we’re talking all things summer including vacations, road trips, beach days, pool life, fireworks disasters, camping stories, and the summer memories that still make us laugh years later.We also answer two new Throuple Hotline questions that immediately turn into chaos:📞 Are you supposed to arrive at 6:00 PM… or leave your house at 6:00 PM?📞 Is making a spreadsheet for vacation normal behavior?We also share some of our favorite travel stories, debate road trips versus flying, talk Fourth of July memories, and somehow end up discussing haunted swimming pools, exploding fireworks, and sex under a pier.Plus:☀️ Summer vacation memories🎆 Fourth of July stories🚗 Road trips vs flying📞 Throuple Hotline🏖️ Beach, lake, pool or AC?🔮 Sassy Astrology😂 Dad Joke of the Week🌽 Garden and corn updatesThank you for spending part o

episodes.title: Daniel Turns 40! 🎂 Pride Month, Life Lessons & Future Adventures
episodes.label: S2 Ep23 · June 26, 2026
episodes.summary: 🎉 Episode 23 is here and we’re celebrating Daniel’s 40th birthday!This week we look back at the last 15 years together, talk about what has changed (and…
episodes.description: 🎉 Episode 23 is here and we’re celebrating Daniel’s 40th birthday!This week we look back at the last 15 years together, talk about what has changed (and what definitely hasn’t), discuss life lessons, aging, friendship, family, and what we’re most excited about for the future.We also dive into one of our favorite Throuple Hotline questions yet, wrap up Pride Month with a Pride-themed Bowl of Chaos, and share this week’s Sassy Astrology forecast.Plus:✨ Daniel’s 40th birthday questions🎂 Chosen family and life lessons🌈 Pride Month memories📞 A confusing Throuple Hotline situation🔮 Sassy Astrology😂 Dad Joke of the Week🐻 Alaska dreams and future adventuresThank you for joining us on this wild ride. Whether you’re listening from the United States, Canada, the UK, Australia, Vietnam, the Philippines, or anywhere else in the world, we appreciate every single one of you.⸻🎧 Full video on Spotify & Y

episodes.title: How Friendships Change As You Get Older
episodes.label: S2 Ep22 · June 19, 2026
episodes.summary: Remember when making friends was as easy as sharing crayons or sitting at the same lunch table? This week, we’re talking about how friendships change as…
episodes.description:
Remember when making friends was as easy as sharing crayons or sitting at the same lunch table?
This week, we’re talking about how friendships change as you get older.
From childhood best friends and high school friend groups to adult friendships that somehow survive years without a text message, we’re diving into what happens when life, careers, relationships, and responsibilities start pulling everyone in different directions.
👦 Why making friends felt so easy as kids
🎓 How friendships changed during our teenage years
🏳️‍🌈 How coming out impacted our friendships

episodes.title: Bowl of Chaos Is on Vacation… and Daniel Doesn’t Know What an Eiffel Tower Is
episodes.label: S2 Ep21 · June 12, 2026
episodes.summary: What happens when the Bowl of Chaos goes on vacation and leaves us unsupervised?In Episode 21 of A Little Throuple Tea, three gay men in a real-life…
episodes.description: What happens when the Bowl of Chaos goes on vacation and leaves us unsupervised?In Episode 21 of A Little Throuple Tea, three gay men in a real-life throuple turn Never Have I Ever into a full episode… and immediately regret it.What starts as a simple drinking game spirals into hookup confessions, relationship crimes, household secrets, Pride Month chaos, Summer House tangents, and one very important question:Does Daniel actually know what an Eiffel Tower is?We talk about:🍹 Never Have I Ever getting messy fast🏳️‍🌈 Pride Month chaos and fair season freedom😂 Daniel’s Eiffel Tower confusion🛏️ Why we do not sleep in the same bed🧦 Daniel sleeping in socks and a shirt🔥 Relationship bickering in real time🌿 Daniel’s Reiki volunteer work🎡 Out at the Fair at the San Diego County FairThis episode is loud, messy, slightly unhinged, and very much what happens when the game takes over the entire show.

episodes.title: A Professional Read Our Birth Charts… and It Explained Our Throuple 😳
episodes.label: S2 Ep20 · June 5, 2026
episodes.summary: Have you ever wondered what would happen if a professional astrologer sat down and analyzed your entire personality? This week, we found out. After…
episodes.description:
Have you ever wondered what would happen if a professional astrologer sat down and analyzed your entire personality?
After visiting a spiritual expo in Southern California, Daniel and Will had their birth charts professionally read while Caleb received his first-ever tarot card reading. What started as a fun afternoon quickly turned into a surprisingly accurate deep dive into our personalities, relationships, life paths, and future plans.
✨ The personality traits that were spot-on
🔮 Caleb’s tarot reading and the major life changes it revealed
🌙 Daniel’s emotional and spiritual connections
🤯 Why Will’s birth chart completely overwhelmed the astrologer

episodes.title: We Handed Off Out at the Fair®… & Got Recognized in a Vegas Bathroom
episodes.label: S2 Ep19 · May 29, 2026
episodes.summary: This episode starts with Vegas…and somehow ends with incest jokes, dragon fruit trauma, and an emotional goodbye to a huge chapter of our lives. 😭 In…
episodes.description:
This episode starts with Vegas…and somehow ends with incest jokes, dragon fruit trauma, and an emotional goodbye to a huge chapter of our lives. 😭
In Episode 19 of
A Little Throuple Tea
, we talk about:
Daniel surviving the Wizard of Oz Sphere experience in Vegas 🎰
Why sitting FRONT ROW at the Sphere is a terrible idea
The emotional moment we officially handed off Out at the Fair after 14 years 🌈
Being recognized in public for the podcast for the first time 👀

episodes.title: Did Aliens Take Caleb?! Our Sleep Data Says YES… - S2 Ep18
episodes.label: S2 Ep18 · May 22, 2026
episodes.summary: One side of the bed got a perfect sleep score…The other side apparently VANISHED for almost 2 hours. 👽 In Episode 18 of A Little Throuple Tea, we spiral…
episodes.description:
One side of the bed got a perfect sleep score…The other side apparently VANISHED for almost 2 hours. 👽
In Episode 18 of A Little Throuple Tea, we spiral into one of the weirdest things that’s ever happened to us after Caleb’s Sleep Number data showed he disappeared from bed for 1 hour and 49 minutes — with ZERO memory of it happening.Was it sleepwalking?A glitch?Aliens?Honestly… we’re not ruling anything out. 😭
* UFOs, alien theories & paranormal stories
* Corporate burnout & AI replacing jobs
* Hot takes on reality stars in politics
* Memorial Day weekend energy & summer plansThis episode is chaotic, emotional, hilarious, slightly unhinged… and somehow one of our favorites yet.

episodes.title: We Dated GIRLS Before This… Our Life Before The Throuple
episodes.label: S2 Ep17 · May 15, 2026
episodes.summary: Before the throuple, before California, before the chaos… we were just three very different kids growing up in very different worlds. This week, we’re…
episodes.description:
Before the throuple, before California, before the chaos… we were just three very different kids growing up in very different worlds.
This week, we’re going all the way back — childhood memories, teenage chaos, first jobs, first relationships (yes… even the girl era), and the moments that shaped who we are today.
From desert lizard hunting to Midwest lake life… from religious upbringings to party years that probably should’ve gotten us arrested (okay, one of us actually did)… this episode is a full throwback.
We also get real about:
• Coming out (and not always on your own terms)
• Losing friends and finding yourself
• The messy path that led us here
• And what our younger selves would
actually
think about our lives now
PLUS… the Throuple Hotline is back with:
• 🚨 Relationship red flags (or are they?)
• 🍽️ The dish debate that almost started a war
• 💀 A petty Costco revenge story that… honestly… we respect
And of course:
🔮 Sassy Astrology is SERVING this week
😑 Daniel’s dad joke… exists

episodes.title: Red Flag… or Just Gay?
episodes.label: S2 Ep16 · May 8, 2026
episodes.summary: Is it a red flag… or is it just gay? This week on A Little Throuple Tea, we break down the behaviors, habits, and reality TV moments that make people…
episodes.description:
Is it a red flag… or is it just gay?
This week on A Little Throuple Tea, we break down the behaviors, habits, and reality TV moments that make people ask:
Is he toxic?
Is he confused?
Is he secretly gay?
Or is he just moisturized and emotionally available?
We talk red flags, gaydar, reality TV men, Summer House chaos, modern masculinity, beauty routines, emotional intelligence, and why some people confuse personality with sexuality.
🐓 Angry rain-soaked chickens
🌵 Replacing dead palm trees with giant cactuses
📺 Summer House & Bravo chaos
🔮 Sassy Astrology
😑 Daniel’s Dad Joke
This episode is funny, chaotic, lightly unhinged, and somehow weirdly insightful.

episodes.title: Things Straight People Don’t Understand About Gay Relationships
episodes.label: S2 Ep15 · May 1, 2026
episodes.summary: What do straight people always ask gay couples and throuples? This week on A Little Throuple Tea, we break down the funniest, weirdest, most common…
episodes.description:
What do straight people always ask gay couples and throuples?
This week on A Little Throuple Tea, we break down the funniest, weirdest, most common questions straight people ask about gay relationships.
Who’s the girl?
Who’s the top?
How do holidays work?
Do your families know?
How does a throuple even work?
We talk chosen family, communication, boundaries, stereotypes, why LGBTQ+ spaces matter, and the things people still don’t understand about queer relationships in 2026.
It gets chaotic, honest, funny, and a little unhinged… as usual.
🎲 Bowl of Chaos – Straight People Questions Edition
📺 SMUT TV – LGBTQ+ representation in TV shows
🔮 Sassy Astrology
😑 Daniel’s Dad Joke

episodes.title: Throuple Takeover: Death Valley (Part 2) — Then Things Got Weird
episodes.label: S2 Ep14 · April 24, 2026
episodes.summary: What happened after Death Valley? In this episode, we finish our Death Valley road trip and break down everything from our final stops in the park to the…
episodes.description:
In this episode, we finish our Death Valley road trip and break down everything from our final stops in the park to the total chaos of getting home.
In Episode 14 of
A Little Throuple Tea
, we pick up where Part 1 left off — this time from home — recapping how the trip ended, what stood out most, and why the ride back somehow became its own adventure.
This is Part 2 of our Death Valley trip, where we talk about the final stretch of the park, the weird roadside stops, the EV charging drama, and the moments that made the last day just as memorable as the first.
On the final day and drive home, we explored:
• Badwater Basin
• Devil’s Golf Course
• Dante’s View
• Artist’s Palette
• Harmony Borax Works
• Death Valley Junction
• Area 51 Alien Center
• Baker
• Victorville
We talk about what it felt like standing below sea level, the surreal views from Dante’s View, the strange beauty of the salt flats, and why Death Valley feels so much bigger and weirder in real life than it ever does in photos.

episodes.title: Throuple Takeover: Death Valley (Part 1) — Not What We Expected
episodes.label: S2 Ep13 · April 17, 2026
episodes.summary: What is Death Valley actually like? In Episode 13 of A Little Throuple Tea , we take the podcast on the road — recording from our hotel room in Stovepipe…
episodes.description:
What is Death Valley actually like?
In Episode 13 of
A Little Throuple Tea
, we take the podcast on the road — recording from our hotel room in Stovepipe Wells Village after the first few days of our trip.
This is Part 1 of our Death Valley series, where we break down everything we’ve experienced so far, what surprised us, and what the desert is actually like beyond the photos.
Over the first three days, we explored:
We talk about the drive out, the scale of the landscape, what felt surreal, what felt underwhelming, and the moments that made the trip worth it.
We also get into what it was like doing this as our first EV road trip — from finding chargers to cost compared to gas and how it actually felt navigating a national park this way.

episodes.title: What We Don’t Post Online (The Truth About Our Relationship)
episodes.label: S2 Ep12 · April 10, 2026
episodes.summary: You see what we post. But you don’t see everything. In Episode 12 of A Little Throuple Tea , we talk about the parts of our life that stay off the…
episodes.description:
In Episode 12 of
A Little Throuple Tea
, we talk about the parts of our life that stay off the internet — not because we’re hiding anything, but because some things are meant to be protected.
• The fights you don’t see — and why conflict isn’t content
• The “boring” days that never get posted
• The boundaries we’ve set around what stays private
• The biggest misconceptions people have based on what we share
• The things we actively protect to keep our relationship strong

episodes.title: Gay Men & Aging: What Changes in Your 20s, 30s & 40s (No One Talks About This)
episodes.label: S2 Ep11 · April 3, 2026
episodes.summary: Gay culture loves youth. But what happens when you’re not 25 anymore? In Episode 11 of A Little Throuple Tea , we have an honest conversation about aging…
episodes.description:
But what happens when you’re not 25 anymore?
In Episode 11 of
A Little Throuple Tea
, we have an honest conversation about aging as gay men — what changes, what gets better, and what people don’t talk about enough.
This is just a real conversation about how life shifts through your 20s, 30s, and 40s — especially in a culture that often prioritizes youth, attention, and appearance.
• The pressure of youth in gay culture
• Body standards and social media comparison
• The shift from chasing attention to choosing alignment

episodes.title: He Hasn’t Seen THESE Movies?! (We Were Shocked)
episodes.label: S2 Ep10 · March 27, 2026
episodes.summary: How do you go through life… and not see these movies? In Episode 10 of A Little Throuple Tea , we put Daniel on the spot and run through the ultimate…
episodes.description:
How do you go through life… and not see
these
movies?
In Episode 10 of
A Little Throuple Tea
, we put Daniel on the spot and run through the ultimate list of movies everyone assumes you’ve seen — and quickly realize… he has missed A LOT.
From classic 90s blockbusters to iconic comedies, cultural staples, and the entire gay movie canon, this episode turns into a full-on roast, reaction, and chaotic movie breakdown.
• The movies everyone has seen (or should have)
• The gay culture canon — the ones that are basically required viewing
• Iconic movies everyone quotes (even if they haven’t seen them)

episodes.title: What 10 Years Together Actually Looks Like (Not What You Think)
episodes.label: S2 Ep9 · March 20, 2026
episodes.summary: What does 10 years of love actually look like? Not the highlight reel. Not the fantasy. The real version. In Episode 9 of A Little Throuple Tea , we talk…
episodes.description:
What does 10 years of love actually look like?
Not the highlight reel. Not the fantasy. The real version.
In Episode 9 of
A Little Throuple Tea
, we talk about what long-term love actually becomes after the early excitement fades — and why that’s not a bad thing.
We break down the difference between what people
think
a throuple relationship looks like versus what it actually takes to maintain one for a decade.
From the hard years filled with growth, ego clashes, and outside pressure… to the quieter, “boring” seasons built on routine, stability, and showing up for each other — this episode is honest, grounded, and real.
Because long-term love isn’t built on constant excitement.

episodes.title: Which Golden Girl Are We? Dorothy, Blanche, Rose or Sophia… The Results Surprised Us
episodes.label: S2 Ep8 · March 13, 2026
episodes.summary: Every friend group has Golden Girl energy… the real question is which one you actually are. In Episode 8 of A Little Throuple Tea , we attempt to figure…
episodes.description:
Every friend group has Golden Girl energy… the real question is which one you actually are.
In Episode 8 of
A Little Throuple Tea
, we attempt to figure out which Golden Girl each of us truly is — and quickly realize you don’t get to assign your own character.
We break down the personalities of Dorothy, Blanche, Rose, and Sophia, argue about which one we think we are, and reveal what those choices say about our relationship dynamic as a real-life throuple.
Along the way we talk about why
The Golden Girls
became such a cultural staple for gay audiences, the power of chosen family, and why the show still resonates decades later.
Plus we recap the latest Vanderpump Rules drama, pull the weekly cards during Sassy Astrology, bring back the Chaos Bowl, and close the episode with Daniel’s infamous Dad Joke.
We drop a big announcement you won’t want to miss.

episodes.title: Tres Amigos, Una Vida: What’s Real, What’s Fiction & The Story Behind the Book
episodes.label: S2 Ep7 · March 6, 2026
episodes.summary: Is Tres Amigos, Una Vida a true story… or fiction? In Episode 7 of A Little Throuple Tea , we finally unpack the question we get asked constantly: How…
episodes.description:
Is
Tres Amigos, Una Vida
a true story… or fiction?
In Episode 7 of
A Little Throuple Tea
, we finally unpack the question we get asked constantly:
This episode goes deeper than the surface. We talk about why we wrote the book in the first place, what parts of our real lives inspired it, what was changed for storytelling, and why the ending of Book One was never meant to be the end.
Because
Tres Amigos, Una Vida
was never designed as a single story — it’s the beginning of a much bigger universe.
We break down the emotional truths inside the book, the choices we made as storytellers, and what’s coming next as the series continues.
And yes… we also tease
Book Two
, which arrives
June 2026
.

episodes.title: We Met Another Throuple… And It Traumatized Us
episodes.label: S2 Ep6 · February 27, 2026
episodes.summary: In Episode 6 of A Little Throuple Tea , three gay men in a real-life throuple share the story of the one and only time they met another throuple in the…
episodes.description:
In Episode 6 of
A Little Throuple Tea
, three gay men in a real-life throuple share the story of the one and only time they met another throuple in the wild — and why it completely changed how they see relationship dynamics.
From subtle red flags to a power dynamic that felt… off, this episode unpacks the moment we realized that not every throuple is healthy just because it’s three.
We talk about the feeling in your gut when something isn’t safe — even if you can’t explain why yet.
If you like queer podcasts that mix real relationship transparency, cultural commentary, and controlled chaos — this one hits different.
🎲 Chaos Bowl — Rank It (Competitive Energy Activated)
📺 SMUT TV —
Traitors
Season 1 breakdown

episodes.title: Sassy Palm Reading Queen
episodes.label: S2 Ep5 · February 20, 2026
episodes.summary: Can your hands expose your entire relationship dynamic? In Episode 5 of A Little Throuple Tea , three gay men in a real-life throuple let the Sassy Palm…
episodes.description:
Can your hands expose your entire relationship dynamic?
In Episode 5 of
A Little Throuple Tea
, three gay men in a real-life throuple let the Sassy Palm Reading Queen take over and read what’s written in their actual palms.
And somehow… why does it all feel accurate?
It’s camp. It’s chaotic. It’s mildly spiritual.
And it was recorded on Valentine’s Day — so the energy was festive.
We break down what each palm says individually — and then what those lines reveal about how the three of us actually function together.

episodes.title: Is Everything Weird Now or Is It Just Us?
episodes.label: S2 Ep4 · February 13, 2026
episodes.summary: Is it just us… or did everyone collectively lose the plot? In Episode 4 of A Little Throuple Tea , three gay men in a real-life throuple clock the chaos…
episodes.description:
Is it just us… or did everyone collectively lose the plot?
In Episode 4 of
A Little Throuple Tea
, three gay men in a real-life throuple clock the chaos of modern life and ask the real question:
Are things actually weird now, or are we just tired?
From social norms that make zero sense to internet behavior that feels fully unhinged, this episode is rapid-fire, observational, and slightly unhinged (in a controlled way).
Just noticing, laughing, and moving on.
If you like queer podcasts that mix relationship dynamics, cultural commentary, and chaotic honesty — this one’s for you.

episodes.title: Aliens, Other Dimensions & Sh*t We Can’t See
episodes.label: S2 Ep3 · February 6, 2026
episodes.summary: In this episode of A Little Throuple Tea , three gay men in a real-life throuple lean into curiosity, conspiracy-adjacent questions, and the kind of…
episodes.description:
In this episode of
A Little Throuple Tea
, three gay men in a real-life throuple lean into curiosity, conspiracy-adjacent questions, and the kind of topics people love to side-eye but secretly think about anyway.
We’re talking aliens, other dimensions, parallel timelines, déjà vu, and things we can’t quite explain — not as experts or truth-tellers, but as three very curious people asking, “Okay but… what if?”
Just humor, curiosity, and a lot of unanswered questions.
• Why aliens feel less wild than half the things humans do
• Why government vagueness gives suspicious energy
• Whether extraterrestrials would even bother with Earth

episodes.title: You Asked, We Answered (And Regretted It)
episodes.label: S2 Ep2 · January 30, 2026
episodes.summary: In this episode of A Little Throuple Tea , three gay men in a real-life throuple answer listener-submitted questions that challenge assumptions, test…
episodes.description:
In this episode of
A Little Throuple Tea
, three gay men in a real-life throuple answer listener-submitted questions that challenge assumptions, test boundaries, and spark honest conversations about visibility, relationships, and public perception.
And a few reminded us why we don’t answer everything.
If you’re into LGBTQ podcasts, throuple dynamics, poly relationship conversations, and chaotic-but-real Q&A episodes — this one gets honest fast.
🎲 The Chaos Bowl — loud, fast, unfiltered
📺 SMUT TV — our verdict on
Beast Games
🔮 Sassy Astrology — weekly tarot + zodiac reset

episodes.title: Season 1 Messed Us Up (In a Good Way)
episodes.label: S2 Ep1 · January 23, 2026
episodes.summary: Season 2 starts here — and Season 1 changed everything. In this episode of A Little Throuple Tea , three gay men in a real-life throuple break down what…
episodes.description:
Season 2 starts here — and Season 1 changed everything.
In this episode of
A Little Throuple Tea
, three gay men in a real-life throuple break down what actually happened behind the scenes of Season 1: what popped off, what feedback hit harder than expected, what boundaries we learned the hard way, and why Season 2 had to feel different.
If you’re into LGBTQ podcasts, gay relationship dynamics, poly/throuple conversations, and chaotic but honest storytelling — this is the reset episode.
• What surprised us most about Season 1
• What we underestimated once people really started listening
• What we’re not doing again in Season 2

episodes.title: Gay Bar Culture, DJ Drama & Season 1 Finale | Gay Throuple Podcast
episodes.label: S1 Ep10 · November 21, 2025
episodes.summary: It’s the Season 1 Finale, and we’re going out the only way we know how — loud, messy, and reminiscing about the golden age of gay bars. 🌈 In Episode 10,…
episodes.description:
It’s the Season 1 Finale, and we’re going out the only way we know how — loud, messy, and reminiscing about the golden age of gay bars. 🌈
In Episode 10, we’re diving into gay bar culture from 2006–2009, the chaos before smartphones changed nightlife, and Will’s 15 years behind the DJ booth watching it all go down. From dance floor disasters to who actually survived a Sunday Funday… we lived through it and somehow came out functional. 😂
As a committed gay throuple, we’re also wrapping up Season 1 — the highs, the chaos, the inside jokes, and everything we didn’t plan but absolutely talked about anyway. If you’re into LGBTQ relationship podcasts, real-life throuple dynamics, and honest conversations about modern gay culture, this one’s for you.
Plus our final round of Smut TV and Social Tea to close out the season.

episodes.title: Money Talk: TINK Edition
episodes.label: S1 Ep9 · November 14, 2025
episodes.summary: In Episode 9 of A Little Throuple Tea , we’re breaking down how we actually manage money as a gay throuple — from budgeting three incomes into one…
episodes.description:
In Episode 9 of
A Little Throuple Tea
, we’re breaking down how we actually manage money as a gay throuple — from budgeting three incomes into one household to figuring out who saves, who spends, and who absolutely cannot be trusted at Costco. 💸
We talk real-life TINK (Two Income, No Kids… plus one more 😏) finances, impulse spending, shared accounts, and how money dynamics affect relationships in a committed polyamorous triad.
🎲 A rapid-fire game that exposes way too much
Somehow this episode is financially responsible
and
completely unhinged.

episodes.title: Birth Charts, Astrology & Gay Throuple Drama
episodes.label: S1 Ep8 · November 7, 2025
episodes.summary: Mercury’s in retrograde, emotions are in chaos, and apparently… don’t trust a unicorn. 💅 In this episode of our gay throuple podcast, we’re diving deep…
episodes.description:
Mercury’s in retrograde, emotions are in chaos, and apparently… don’t trust a unicorn. 💅
In this episode of our gay throuple podcast, we’re diving deep into birth charts, astrology, and how the stars might actually explain our personalities — and our LGBTQ relationship drama.
Daniel breaks down rising signs, sun and moon placements, and why he’s convinced the universe predicted this throuple. From love languages to reality TV smut, this one is equal parts cosmic and chaotic.
We debate which planet keeps messing with our Wi-Fi (spoiler: it’s always Mercury), whether astrology can predict compatibility in a polyamorous relationship, and why Will almost peed from laughing during this episode. 😂
If you’ve ever wondered how astrology affects relationships — especially in a three-person partnership — this one’s for you.

episodes.title: Gay Throuple Hustle Culture & Spooky Movie Chaos
episodes.label: S1 Ep7 · October 31, 2025
episodes.summary: Happy Halloween! 👻 This week on our gay throuple podcast, we’re diving into hustle culture — queer style. In Episode 7 of A Little Throuple Tea , we talk…
episodes.description:
Happy Halloween! 👻 This week on our gay throuple podcast, we’re diving into hustle culture — queer style.
In Episode 7 of
A Little Throuple Tea
, we talk about how we built a full-blown LGBTQ lifestyle brand from chaos. From Out at the Fair to books, podcasts, plants, cookies, and content creation, we break down how three gay men turned side hustles into a throuple-powered empire.
Plus: spooky publishing horror stories, haunted movie debates, and which one of us definitely dies first in a scary film. Trick or treat — this throuple came to slay. 🎃

episodes.title: Gay Throuple Life: Neighbors, Noise & Nosy People
episodes.label: S1 Ep6 · October 24, 2025
episodes.summary: Episode 6 is here! When three gay guys move in together, apparently it’s not just a house — it’s an “orgy mansion.” 🙄 From awkward first impressions to…
episodes.description:
Episode 6 is here! When three gay guys move in together, apparently it’s not just a house — it’s an “orgy mansion.” 🙄
From awkward first impressions to Pride flag drama, loud labels, and nosy neighbors, we’re spilling all the neighborhood tea. Who thought we were “just roommates”? Who called us the loudest house on the block? And which neighbor interaction had us laughing (and cringing) the most?
Plus, we’re answering fake “viewer questions” until you send us real ones for Season 2 at ThroupleTea.com.
This is real-life gay throuple chaos — unfiltered, messy, and hilarious.

episodes.title: Haunted House Chaos & Paranormal Drama | Gay Throuple Podcast
episodes.label: S1 Ep5 · October 17, 2025
episodes.summary: Episode 5 is here — and yes, it might be haunted. 👻 Most couples argue about bills. We argue about the ghost in the hallway. From house-hunting chaos as…
episodes.description:
Episode 5 is here — and yes, it might be haunted. 👻
We argue about the ghost in the hallway.
From house-hunting chaos as a throuple to flickering lights, creaky floors, and full paranormal vibes, we’re spilling all the spooky tea.
• Who would actually invite the ghost to brunch
• A listener Q about ghosting (in dating, not the attic)
• Our take on finding real connection in a world that loves to fetishize

episodes.title: Traveling as a Gay Throuple: Catch Flights, Not Feelings
episodes.label: S1 Ep4 · October 10, 2025
episodes.summary: Episode 4 is here! In this one, we’re talking about traveling as a gay throuple — from TSA side-eyes to three-in-a-bed hotel math. We spill: • Who…
episodes.description:
Episode 4 is here! In this one, we’re talking about traveling as a gay throuple — from TSA side-eyes to three-in-a-bed hotel math.
• Who overpacks and who forgets everything
• What it’s really like booking hotels as a three-person relationship
• The trip drama that almost broke us (but makes us laugh now)
Traveling in a committed polyamorous relationship isn’t always smooth — and this throuple definitely doesn’t do layovers quietly.

episodes.title: Gay Chicken Farmers, Backyard Chaos & Throuple Life 🐓😂
episodes.label: S1 Ep3 · October 3, 2025
episodes.summary: We didn’t plan on becoming gay chicken farmers… but somehow our throuple life now includes backyard chickens, dogs, gardens, and pure chaos. 🐓😂 In…
episodes.description:
We didn’t plan on becoming gay chicken farmers… but somehow our throuple life now includes backyard chickens, dogs, gardens, and pure chaos. 🐓😂
In Episode 3 of
A Little Throuple Tea
, we share our funniest chicken stories, talk about the shift from city jobs and fairgrounds to farm vibes, and break down this week’s Smut TV segment.
From eggs to Etsy, this is real-life gay throuple energy — messy, hilarious, and unexpectedly wholesome.
If you’ve ever wondered what a 3-person relationship looks like outside the city… buckle up.

episodes.title: The Q&A Episode (aka What You Really Want to Know)
episodes.label: S1 Ep2 · September 26, 2025
episodes.summary: Episode 2 of A Little Throuple Tea is here! This week, we’re answering your questions about our real-life gay throuple relationship — how we make a…
episodes.description:
Episode 2 of
A Little Throuple Tea
is here! This week, we’re answering your questions about our real-life gay throuple relationship — how we make a 3-person relationship work, boundaries, jealousy, dating, and what polyamory actually looks like behind the scenes.
We also catch up on life updates and dive into our weekly
Smut TV
segment (yes… we went there).
Heads up — this one’s a long ride (just over an hour), so buckle up. It’s messy, it’s honest, and it’s basically like hanging out on the couch with your favorite chaotic gay throuple.
If you’re curious about polyamory, throuple dynamics, LGBTQ relationships, or how three committed partners navigate real life together — this episode is for you.

episodes.title: Meet the Gay Throuple: How Our 3-Person Relationship Works
episodes.label: S1 Ep1 · September 19, 2025
episodes.summary: Welcome to A Little Throuple Tea — a real-life gay throuple podcast hosted by William, Caleb, and Daniel. In this first episode, we introduce ourselves,…
episodes.description:
Welcome to
A Little Throuple Tea
— a real-life gay throuple podcast hosted by William, Caleb, and Daniel.
In this first episode, we introduce ourselves, share how our three-person relationship began, and talk about what it’s really like being in a committed polyamorous triad. From messy beginnings to building a stable partnership, nothing is off limits.
• Navigating jealousy & communication
• What people get wrong about throuples
• Life as an LGBTQ+ non-traditional relationship
If you’ve ever wondered how a gay throuple works, this is where it starts.

episodes.summary: Welcome to 3Dudes1Life: A Little Throuple Tea — where love, chaos, and laughter collide. This teaser is just a taste of what’s coming from William,…
episodes.description:
Welcome to
3Dudes1Life: A Little Throuple Tea
— where love, chaos, and laughter collide. This teaser is just a taste of what’s coming from William, Caleb, and Daniel: the wins, the wild nights, and the
‘did that really just happen?’
moments. New full episodes are on the way… and we can’t wait to spill a little throuple tea!
